Package microui.core.style.theme

Class ThemeManager

java.lang.Object
microui.core.style.theme.ThemeManager
public final class ThemeManager extends Object
Manager for handling theme selection and retrieval in the MicroUI framework. Provides a centralized way to set and get the current theme used by all UI components.

The ThemeManager follows the singleton pattern for theme management, allowing global theme changes that affect all components. By default, it uses ThemeWhite as the initial theme.

See Also:
